title: [Moonsu] Better GUI Create Style for Tom's Simple Storage
description: Wood and Gold GUI for Tom's Simple Storage!
body:
## I found that the GUI needed a more unique style.
![Better GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d6ec9707858c6d70f93a990a427abb09084a7e.png)
_**(Check the "images" tab if the main image does not load)**_

![Better GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/707dc69dd272b9dbbe62f0f112a62da5b7eb069d.png)




### Link mod!: [https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)
### Can i use for my modpack?
**Sure! no problem, but I would appreciate if you could leave credits.**


Any questions or suggestions can be left in the Official Discord: [Discord!](https://discord.gg/bGfyh9EXrT)
